name: Cosmise Streamboards
description: Watch an agent build, verify, and present organisation-scoped Streamboards reports.

secrets.name: COSMISE_MCP_TOKEN
secrets.description: Backend-only organisation-scoped Cosmise MCP credential. The app also discovers the connected profile's protected Gateway environment at runtime.

integrations.reason: Give this trusted backend organisation-scoped read/write Cosmise MCP access without exposing the credential to browser code.

permissions.reason: Call the profile-scoped Cosmise MCP from the backend and render canonical public Streamboard URLs.
